summary: Implemented wireframe polyhedra geometry system (US-054). Created polyhedraEdges generator supporting 4 base shapes (icosahedron, octahedron, dodecahedron, tetrahedron) using Three.js EdgesGeometry. Built vertex/fragment shaders with full audio-reactive displacement pipeline (bass macro deformation, treble micro jitter, twist, drift, breathing, fog). The wireframePolyhedra system renders multiple LineSegments with seeded shape selection, 3D volumetric placement, and random rotations. Added WIREPOLYHEDRA_ATTRIBUTES to shader registry, maxPolyhedra to QualityProfile (3/6/12 per tier), and registered as 6th mode in modeManager. All 1170 tests pass including 52 new US-054 tests.
